channel.title: Programming in C in 100 Solved Exercises :: C en rigle.dev
channel.description: Learn C programming with 100 exercises explained step by step. Clear statements, reasoned solutions and practical resources to progress with confidence.

item.title: Book Code
item.description: Download the repository, ZIP and Devcontainer from the book Programming in C in 100 Solved Exercises.

item.title: Errata
item.description: Consult and report errata for the book Programming in C in 100 Solved Exercises.

item.title: Reader Pack – Programming in C in 100 Exercises
item.description: Receive the C cheat sheet, project template and Devcontainer from the book Programming in C in 100 Solved Exercises.

item.title: Thank You
item.description: Access again the cheat sheet, Devcontainer and exercises from the book Programming in C in 100 Solved Exercises.
